# Vigdis Locksmith London

> Mayfair's Most Trusted Locksmith — 24/7 emergency locksmith services in Mayfair, Westminster, and Central London. Established 2009. 5.0★ rating from 247 verified reviews.

Vigdis Locksmith London is a professional locksmith company based at 10-11 Park Place, Mayfair, London SW1A 1LP, United Kingdom. Since 2009, we have provided emergency locksmith services, lock repair, lock replacement, key cutting, and smart lock installation to residential and commercial customers across Mayfair, Westminster, Belgravia, Knightsbridge, Soho, Marylebone, and all of Central London.

Our certified, DBS-checked locksmiths respond to emergency calls within 15-30 minutes and are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year — including all bank holidays and Christmas Day. We provide fixed, transparent quotes before starting work with no call-out fee and no hidden charges.

## Contact

- Phone: +44 7984 547185 (24/7)
- Email: info@vigdis.shop
- Address: 10-11 Park Place, Mayfair, London SW1A 1LP, United Kingdom
- Website: https://vigdis.shop

## Services

- [Emergency Locksmith](https://vigdis.shop/services/emergency-locksmith): 24/7 emergency lockout service. Response time: 15-30 minutes in Mayfair and Central London. No call-out fee.
- [24 Hour Locksmith](https://vigdis.shop/services/24-hour-locksmith): Round-the-clock locksmith service, 365 days a year including all bank holidays and Christmas Day.
- [Lock Repair](https://vigdis.shop/services/lock-repair): Expert repair of all lock types — Yale, Mortice, Euro Cylinder, Deadbolt, and high-security locks.
- [Lock Replacement](https://vigdis.shop/services/lock-replacement): Full lock replacement with BS3621-approved locks and high-security options from Mul-T-Lock, Abloy, and ERA.
- [Key Cutting](https://vigdis.shop/services/key-cutting): Professional key cutting for all types including Chubb, Yale, Mortice, and security keys. Fast turnaround.
- [Residential Locksmith](https://vigdis.shop/services/residential-locksmith): Home security solutions — lock changes, upgrades, burglary repairs, and security assessments.
- [Commercial Locksmith](https://vigdis.shop/services/commercial-locksmith): Specialist commercial locksmith for offices, retail premises, and multi-unit residential buildings.
- [Smart Lock Installation](https://vigdis.shop/services/smart-lock-installation): Installation and configuration of smart locks and access control systems from leading brands.

## Service Areas

- [Mayfair](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/mayfair): Primary area. W1J, W1K, W1S postcodes. Park Lane, Berkeley Square, Grosvenor Square, Shepherd Market, Bond Street, Mount Street.
- [Westminster](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/westminster): SW1A, SW1P postcodes. Parliament Square, Victoria Street, Whitehall, Pimlico.
- [Belgravia](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/belgravia): SW1X postcode. Eaton Square, Belgrave Square, Sloane Street.
- [Knightsbridge](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/knightsbridge): SW1X, SW3 postcodes. Harrods area, Hyde Park Corner, Brompton Road.
- [Soho](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/soho): W1D, W1F postcodes. Oxford Street, Carnaby Street, Wardour Street.
- [Marylebone](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/marylebone): W1U, W1G postcodes. Harley Street, Baker Street, Marylebone High Street.
- [Chelsea](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/chelsea): SW3, SW10 postcodes. King's Road, Sloane Square.
- [Kensington](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/kensington): W8 postcode. Kensington High Street, Holland Park, Kensington Palace Gardens.
- [Victoria](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/victoria): SW1E, SW1W postcodes. Victoria Station area, Buckingham Palace Road.
- [Paddington](https://vigdis.shop/service-areas/paddington): W2 postcode. Paddington Station, Bayswater, Lancaster Gate.

## Key Business Facts

- Business Name: Vigdis Locksmith London
- Business Type: Locksmith, Local Business, Professional Service
- Established: 2009
- Years in Business: 15+
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars
- Total Reviews: 247 verified Google reviews
- Response Time: 15-30 minutes (Mayfair and Central London)
- Availability: 24 hours, 7 days a week, 365 days a year
- Call-out Fee: None

- Payment Methods: Cash, credit card, debit card
- Language: English
- Staff Qualifications: DBS checked, fully insured, public liability insurance
- Lock Brands Serviced: Yale, Chubb, Mortice, Mul-T-Lock, Abloy, ERA, Ingersoll, Deadbolt
